description_long: This object is a heavy, automated turret-style rifle system mounted on a robust hexagonal base, designed for stationary defense in urban environments. The main body is constructed from matte, sand-colored metal with visible wear and weathering, suggesting use in outdoor or combat scenarios. It features dual long barrels extending from a reinforced housing, with a prominent cylindrical mechanism and a side-mounted box, likely for ammunition or electronics. The base is equipped with angular armor plating and a set of three rectangular storage or battery compartments on one side. On top, there is a small, circular sighting device and various mechanical details, including bolts, vents, and access panels. The overall design is utilitarian and militaristic, optimized for durability and automated operation rather than portability.
description: A heavy, sand-colored automated turret rifle with dual barrels, mounted on a reinforced hexagonal base and equipped with a top-mounted sight and side compartments. The design is robust, angular, and built for stationary defense.
description_view_0: Side view showing dual barrels, the main body, and three rectangular compartments on the left side of the base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin barrels, central housing, and the circular sighting device on top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with dual barrels, main housing, and the right side of the base, lacking the side compartments seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the base, the rear of the main housing, and the top-mounted sighting device.
